title: More Music
description: More Music is Medieval Music but Modrinth and no Biome Music
body:
![More music banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ntw6vpSk/images/04ecf482b043bc39ea780b987fe8a39173a63ed2.png)
More Music adds most of the music Medieval Music has. Thanks to Alexander Nakarada for making the music, check him out [here](https://creatorchords.com)
